verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Nothing between my soul and the Saviour, Naught of this world's delusive dream: I have renounced all sinful pleasure, Jesus is mine, there's nothing between.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Nothing between my soul and the Saviour, So that His blessed face may be seen; Nothing preventing the least of His favour, Keep the way clear! Let nothing between.

verse.name: v3
v4
v5
verse.lines: Nothing between, e'en many hard trials, Though the whole world against me convene; Watching with prayer and much self-denial, I'll triumph at last, with nothing between.
